final_response:
The container health check has completed. The output shows that the health check script ran successfully, but no containers were found running at the time of the check. This could mean:

1. No containers are currently active/running
2. The containers may need to be started separately
3. The environment may not have Docker/container services running yet

Would you like me to:
- Check what containers exist (if any)?
- Look at the contents of the health-check script to understand what it's checking
